vocab.example: We need to finish year-end closing by the end of this week.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta cần hoàn tất quyết toán cuối năm trước cuối tuần này.

vocab.example: I'm still finalizing a few accounts before the deadline.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi vẫn đang hoàn tất vài tài khoản trước hạn chót.

vocab.example: What's our cut-off date for this quarter?
vocab.example_vi: Ngày chốt sổ của quý này là khi nào?

vocab.example: A few accruals still need to be recorded.
vocab.example_vi: Vẫn còn vài khoản dồn tích cần được ghi nhận.

vocab.meaning_vi: mục còn treo, chưa xử lý
vocab.example: Are there any pending items left on the checklist?
vocab.example_vi: Còn mục nào chưa xử lý trong danh sách kiểm tra không?

vocab.example: Please double-check all the numbers before you submit.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng kiểm tra lại tất cả số liệu trước khi nộp.

vocab.meaning_vi: chịu áp lực về thời gian
vocab.example: The whole team is under time pressure this week.
vocab.example_vi: Cả đội đang chịu áp lực thời gian trong tuần này.

vocab.example: We really need to wrap up the books on time.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta thực sự cần chốt sổ sách đúng hạn.

lines.speaker: Lan (finance manager)
lines.text: We need to finish year-end closing by Friday, Phong.

lines.speaker: Phong (accountant)
lines.text: I understand. I'm still finalizing a few accounts.

lines.speaker: Lan (finance manager)
lines.text: What's our cut-off date for this quarter again?

lines.speaker: Phong (accountant)
lines.text: It's July 20th. After that, we can't add new entries.

lines.speaker: Lan (finance manager)
lines.text: Do we still have any pending items on the checklist?

lines.speaker: Phong (accountant)
lines.text: Yes, a few accruals need to be recorded first.

lines.speaker: Lan (finance manager)
lines.text: Please double-check all the numbers before you submit them.

lines.speaker: Phong (accountant)
lines.text: Sure. The whole team is under time pressure this week.

lines.speaker: Lan (finance manager)
lines.text: I know, but we really need to wrap up the books on time.

lines.speaker: Phong (accountant)
lines.text: Don't worry, I'll finalize everything by tomorrow morning.

questions.q: When is the cut-off date for this quarter?
What does Phong still need to record?
What does Lan ask Phong to do before submitting?

shadowing: We need to finish year-end closing by the end of this week.
I'm still finalizing a few accounts before the final deadline tomorrow.
Do we still have any pending items left on the checklist?
Please double-check all the numbers carefully before you submit them.
The whole team is under time pressure to wrap up the books.
